name: Phoenix Rolls (Banh Phuong Hoang)
recipeIngredient: 10 Pieces of ham 2 inches by 1/2 inch
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each chicken breast into 5 thin slices.
2. In a mortar, smash the shrimp until it forms a paste. Add the chopped green onions, lemon grass, salt, and black pepper. Continue mashing until you have a paste.
3. Lay the chicken fillet on a flat surface. Place a piece of ham at one end and top it with 1/10 of the shrimp mixture.
4. Roll up the chicken, dip in cornstarch, and fry in oil until golden. I have never tried this without the ham, but it seems like it might work.
Note: The original recipe text contained some formatting issues and unclear instructions. The rewritten version separates ingredients from instructions for clarity and uses standard measurement units (e.g., "tbs" → "tbsp").
